ddls:
CREATE TABLE "oauth_clients" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each OAuth client */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the client */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the OAuth client */,
  "secret" TEXT /* Secret key for the OAuth client */,
  "redirect" TEXT /* Redirect URI for the OAuth client */,
  "personal_access_client" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the client is a personal access client (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "password_client" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the client is a password client (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "revoked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the client has been revoked (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the client was last updated */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the client is used */,
  "grant_type" TEXT /* Type of grant (e.g., authorization_code, client_credentials, password, refresh_token) */,
  "scope_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of scope IDs to which the client is entitled */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the client was used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the client was last used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the client (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oauth_clients_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES client_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_oauth_clients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_login_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_scopes" (
  "scope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scope */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the scope is associated with */,
  "scope_name" TEXT /* Name of the scope */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scope */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scope was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the scope was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_scopes_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES oauth_clients ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access token */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the token is issued to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the token is issued to */,
  "token" TEXT /* Access token value */,
  "revoked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the token has been revoked (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was last updated */,
  "scope_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of scope IDs associated with the token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the token was used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the token was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_tokens_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_tokens_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES oauth_clients ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refresh_tokens" (
  "token_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refresh token */,
  "access_token_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access token the refresh token is associated with */,
  "token" TEXT /* Refresh token value */,
  "revoked" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the token has been revoked (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "expires_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token expires */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the token was last updated */,
  "scope_ids" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of scope IDs associated with the refresh token */,
  "last_used_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the refresh token was used */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the refresh token was last used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("token_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refresh_tokens_access_token_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_token_id") REFERENCES access_tokens ("token_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_environments" (
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the environment is associated with */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment (e.g., development, staging, production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the environment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_environments_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES oauth_clients ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "client_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client involved in the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user involved in the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., create, update, revoke) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the activity occurred */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was last updated */,
  "environment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environment where the activity occurred */,
  "client_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the client activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_logs_environment_id FOREIGN KEY ("environment_id") REFERENCES client_environments ("environment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES oauth_clients ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_client_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
